MANAGER: true

GOAL: Ship Co-Exist 1.8.4 feature batch end-to-end. 18 items grouped into 5 worker streams. You decompose, dispatch sub-forks with parent_fork_id=your own id, poll for completion, retry failed workers once with corrected guidance, consolidate into ONE [FORK_REPORT] for the conductor.

ORIGIN: Tate verbatim 6 May 2026 21:31 AEST: "Can we get that 1.8.4 fork going now, im going to test the push notifications then i want to load it all togeqther and submit 1.8.4 if puysh notificaitos
